subject: Re: joining datasets in warp
body:
Hi Przemek,

M can take data from multiple sources so you can process the data independently up until that point, then co-refine.

Once your M session is set up you can join particle sets together and, if you want, export one big set of particles for use in another program.

Cheers,

Alister

> On 15 Oct 2021, at 07:10, Przemysław Dutka <przemyslaw.dutka@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> ﻿Hi All,
> 
> I have two datasets that were collected on the same microscope, same camera and same pixel size. They were collected couple months apart so they have different gain reference. I wonder if there is some easy way to join them in warp so that I can easily continue downstream processing in Dynamo, Relion and M?
> 
> Thanks,
> Przemek 
> --
